# Fixera

Fixera is an independent handyman and home-maintenance service in Copenhagen, Denmark.
Portfolio Case Study handles the work personally for apartments, private homes, rentals and property managers.

## Official pages

Homepage: https://fixera.net/
About Fixera: https://fixera.net/about
Services overview: https://fixera.net/services
Areas covered: https://fixera.net/areas/
Projects and work examples: https://fixera.net/projects
Contact and quote request: https://fixera.net/contact

## Business identity

Business name: Fixera
Founder and operator: Portfolio Case Study
CVR: 43921746
Phone and WhatsApp: +45 71 87 64 21
Email: hello@fixera.net
Location: Copenhagen, Denmark
Availability: Monday to Friday, 09:00–18:00

## What Fixera does

Fixera provides practical handyman work, small repairs, installations, furniture assembly and property maintenance.
The service is intended for customers who need a clear scope, a practical quote and tidy completion of the job.

## Main services

General repairs and maintenance: https://fixera.net/services/repairs
Home installations: https://fixera.net/services/installations
Lamp installation in Copenhagen: https://fixera.net/services/lamp-installation-copenhagen
TV mounting in Copenhagen: https://fixera.net/services/tv-mounting-copenhagen
Shelf installation in Copenhagen: https://fixera.net/services/shelf-installation-copenhagen
Furniture assembly: https://fixera.net/services/furniture-assembly
IKEA furniture assembly in Copenhagen: https://fixera.net/services/ikea-furniture-assembly-copenhagen
Curtain installation: https://fixera.net/services/curtains
End-of-tenancy repairs: https://fixera.net/services/end-of-tenancy
Painting and wall repairs: https://fixera.net/services/painting
Interior woodwork: https://fixera.net/services/woodwork
Skirting boards installation and repair: https://fixera.net/services/skirting-boards-copenhagen
Smart home and office automations: https://fixera.net/services/smart-home-automations

## Rental and property support

Short-term rental maintenance: https://fixera.net/services/short-term-rental-maintenance-copenhagen
Property maintenance: https://fixera.net/services/property-maintenance-copenhagen
Property operations support: https://fixera.net/services/property-operations-support-copenhagen

## Hospitality and office support

Hospitality maintenance for hotels, restaurants and venues: https://fixera.net/services/hospitality-maintenance-copenhagen
Office maintenance and practical business support: https://fixera.net/services/office-maintenance-copenhagen

## Service area

Fixera serves Copenhagen and nearby districts including Frederiksberg, Hellerup, Gentofte, Gladsaxe, Søborg and Charlottenlund.
Area pages with local service information are listed at https://fixera.net/areas/

## How to request help

Customers can send a short description, photos, address or area and preferred timing through WhatsApp or the contact form.
Photos help Fixera assess the job and reply with an estimate or the next step.
Contact: https://fixera.net/contact

## Business documentation

Invoicing: CVR-compliant invoicing
Business liability insurance: active through Topdanmark / If
Coverage: professional liability and product liability up to 10,000,000 DKK per year
Insurance coverage area: Europe
Insurance active since: September 2025
